raw_title: Conceptualizing Fidelity: Reimagining Contemporary Visual Journalism’s Occupational Ideologies
title_en: Conceptualizing Fidelity: Reimagining Contemporary Visual Journalism’s Occupational Ideologies
title_zh: 概念化保真度：重新构想当代视觉新闻的职业意识形态
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了当代视觉新闻工作者如何理解和实践他们的职业理念。它研究记者在工作中如何平衡真实报道与个人或组织观点，特别是在数字时代面临的新挑战。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how contemporary visual journalists understand and practice their professional beliefs. It explores how reporters balance truthful reporting with personal or organizational perspectives, especially in the face of new challenges in the digital age.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于媒体研究和新闻学领域，关注职业意识形态在数字新闻环境中的演变和影响。
research_direction_en: This research falls within media studies and journalism, focusing on the evolution and impact of occupational ideologies in digital news environments.
